title: Pandemonium Craft
description: Minecraft 1.12.2 after 10 energy drinks - 150+ mods of pure chaos. Dragons? Check. Nukes? Obviously. Your sanity? Gone.
body:
🌋 Pandemonium Craft – A Chaotic 1.12.2 Modpack for the Insane
Minecraft 1.12.2 shoved into a blender with 150+ mods—then set on fire.

🔥 What is this modpack?
Pandemonium Craft is a high-chaos kitchen-sink modpack that throws everything at you—dimensions, bosses, magic, and tech—with zero balance. It’s for players who want over-the-top adventures, brutal fights, and absolute mayhem.

⚡ Features:

✅ Dimensions & Exploration – Explore the Aether, Twilight Forest, The Erebus, and more.

✅ Brutal Bosses & Mobs – Fight dragons, Lovecraftian horrors, Infernal Mobs, and dungeon spawners that want you dead.

✅ OP Gear & Magic – Wield Thaumcraft, Astral Sorcery, Electroblob’s Wizardry, and broken weapons.

✅ Tech & Mayhem – Automate, explode, and break the game with mods like Draconic Evolution.

✅ Zero Balance – This pack is not for the faint of heart. Expect bugs, crashes, and glorious insanity.

💀 Requirements & Notes:

⚠ 6GB RAM minimum (8GB+ recommended) – This pack is heavy.

⚠ Some mods require manual installation (due to licensing) – See the list below.

⚠ BACKUP YOUR WORLDS – Things will break.

📜 Manually-Added Mods (Required for Full Experience):

Thaumcraft

Optifine

The Twilight Forest

The Erebus

Electroblob’s Wizardry

Astral Sorcery

Primitive Mobs

Infernal Mobs

⚠ WARNING: This modpack is a grenade with the pin pulled. Play at your own risk.
